title: How To Diagnose Your Heart
stanceSummary: The believer’s heart is described in hadith as one of four types; spiritual health is not measured by emotional intensity alone but by regret after sin and joy in worship, and by whether the Qur’an still enlivens you. One heart cannot feed on sin and expect sweetness in devotion. Auto-captions below are lightly cleaned; confirm wording against the audio.
alternateQuestions: How do I know if my heart is spiritually healthy in Islam?
What are the types of hearts in the hadith?
Why doesn’t my heart feel the Qur’an during Ramadan?
What is spiritual junk food Omar Suleiman?
